questions.question: Which of the following countries granted Elon Musk citizenship from birth?
questions.explanation: The text states that Musk holds both South African and Canadian citizenship from birth, as his mother was born in Canada and he was born in South Africa.

questions.question: Elon Musk is the CEO and product architect of which company?
questions.explanation: The material specifies that Elon Musk is the CEO and product architect of Tesla.

questions.question: X.com, co-founded by Elon Musk, merged to form PayPal and was later acquired by eBay in what year?
questions.explanation: The text states that PayPal, formed from X.com, was acquired by eBay in 2002.

questions.question: According to Forbes as of February 2026, what was Elon Musk's estimated net worth?
questions.explanation: As of February 2026, Forbes estimates his net worth to be around US$852 billion.

questions.question: What position did Elon Musk hold in the Trump administration after Donald Trump's inauguration in early 2025?
questions.explanation: Musk served as Senior Advisor to the President and de facto head of the Department of Government Efficiency (DOGE).

questions.question: Which of the following has Elon Musk been criticized for, according to the provided text?
questions.explanation: The material mentions criticisms for 'COVID-19 misinformation, promoting conspiracy theories, and affirming antisemitic, racist, and transphobic comments'.

questions.question: What were Elon Musk's parents' professions as described in the text?
options: His mother was a politician and his father was an artist.
His mother was a model and dietitian, and his father was an electromechanical engineer and property developer, among other things.
Both of his parents were academics.
His mother was a lawyer and his father was a doctor.
questions.explanation: His mother, Maye, is described as a model and dietitian, and his father, Errol, as an electromechanical engineer, pilot, sailor, consultant, emerald dealer, and property developer.

questions.question: Why did Elon Musk establish xAI after co-founding OpenAI?
options: He was discontent with OpenAI's direction.
He wanted to focus solely on reusable rockets.
OpenAI was acquired by another company.
questions.explanation: He left OpenAI due to 'growing discontent with the organization's direction' and subsequently established xAI.

questions.question: When did Elon Musk acquire the social network Twitter, which he later rebranded as X?
questions.explanation: He acquired Twitter in 2022 and rebranded it as X in 2023.

questions.question: From which university did Elon Musk receive his bachelor's degrees in 1997?
questions.explanation: The text states he received his bachelor's degrees in 1997 from the University of Pennsylvania.
